'''bakufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberaggressor|cyberaggressor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberaggressor|cyberaggressor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bakufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bækifith|bækifith]] || [[word:bækifij|bækifij]] || [[word:bækifish|bækifish]] || [[word:bækifi|bækifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakukufuth|bakukufuth]] || [[word:bakukufuj|bakukufuj]] || [[word:bakukufush|bakukufush]] || [[word:bakukufu|bakukufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakufuth|bakufuth]] || [[word:bakufuj|bakufuj]] || [[word:bakufush|bakufush]] || [[word:bakufu|bakufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakuffuth|bakuffuth]] || [[word:bakuffuj|bakuffuj]] || [[word:bakuffush|bakuffush]] || [[word:bakuffuf|bakuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakufuthu|bakufuthu]] || [[word:bakufuju|bakufuju]] || [[word:bakufushu|bakufushu]] || [[word:bakufuku|bakufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakufuth|bakufuth]] || [[word:bakufuj|bakufuj]] || [[word:bakufush|bakufush]] || [[word:bakufu|bakufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakufuthul|bakufuthul]] || [[word:bakufujul|bakufujul]] || [[word:bakufushul|bakufushul]] || [[word:bakufukul|bakufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakufuthuthu|bakufuthuthu]] || [[word:bakufujuju|bakufujuju]] || [[word:bakufushushu|bakufushushu]] || [[word:bakufuku|bakufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakufuthun|bakufuthun]] || [[word:bakufujun|bakufujun]] || [[word:bakufushun|bakufushun]] || [[word:bakufukun|bakufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakufuthuoro|bakufuthuoro]] || [[word:bakufujuoro|bakufujuoro]] || [[word:bakufushuoro|bakufushuoro]] || [[word:bakufukuoro|bakufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
